column1: Industrial Steam Cleaning Of Nj, Llc|https://www.greasebustersnj.com/|https://www.bers.nyc.gov/assets/fdny/downloads/pdf/business/approved-companies-commercial-cooking.pdf#page=19-industrial-steam-cleaning-of-nj|North Jersey|North Jersey, eastern Pennsylvania, and nearby Northeast commercial kitchens with kitchen exhaust systems|Andrei Bandarovich|admin@GREASEBUSTERSNJ.COM|973-702-1333|FDNY's April 15, 2026 approved commercial cooking contractor list names Industrial Steam Cleaning Of Nj, Llc in Old Bridge with owner Andrei Bandarovich and public admin@GREASEBUSTERSNJ.COM, while the official Greasebusters NJ site says the company provides complete kitchen exhaust hood system cleaning, including hoods, hood filters, duct work, and exhaust fans to NFPA 96 standards.

Master Fire Duct Cleaning Corp|https://masterfireductcleaning.com/|https://www.bers.nyc.gov/assets/fdny/downloads/pdf/business/approved-companies-commercial-cooking.pdf#page=25-master-fire-duct-cleaning|New York City|Manhattan, Brooklyn, Bronx, Queens, Staten Island, Yonkers, White Plains, and nearby downstate New York commercial kitchens|Alester E Owens|ALESTEROWENS@GMAIL.COM|718-828-6111|FDNY's April 15, 2026 approved commercial cooking contractor list names Master Fire Duct Cleaning Corp in the Bronx with public Gmail and phone, while the official site markets Restaurant Hood & Duct Cleaning Service NYC and describes the company as a commercial kitchen hood and duct cleaning operator serving restaurants and commercial kitchens across New York City and nearby Westchester.
